@startuml

' Enumerations
enum TestGroup {
    BloodTests
    UltrasoundExaminations
    ...
}

enum RepetitionInterval {
    Weekly
    Monthly
    HalfYearly
    Yearly
}

' Classes
class LabTracker {
}

class Person {
    firstName : String
    lastName : String
    address : String
    phoneNumber : String
}

class Doctor {
    practitionerNumber : Integer
    fullName : String
    signature : String
    address : String
    phoneNumber : String
}

class Patient {
    healthNumber : String
    firstName : String
    lastName : String
    birthDate : Date
    address : String
    phoneNumber : String
}

class Lab {
    registrationNumber : Integer
    name : String
    address : String
    startTime : Time
    endTime : Time
    changeCancelFee : Double
}

class Requisition {
    validFrom : Date
    repetitionInterval : RepetitionInterval
    numberOfRepeats : Integer
}

class Test {
    name : String
    group : TestGroup
    duration : Time
    isAppointmentRequired : Boolean
    isWalkIn : Boolean
    isDropOff : Boolean
}

class Appointment {
    confirmationNumber : Integer
    date : Date
    startTime : Time
    endTime : Time
}

' Relationships
LabTracker "1" *-- "*" Doctor
LabTracker "1" *-- "*" Patient
LabTracker "1" *-- "*" Lab
LabTracker "1" *-- "*" Requisition
LabTracker "1" *-- "*" Test
LabTracker "1" *-- "*" Appointment

Doctor "1" --> "*" Requisition : prescribes
Patient "1" --> "*" Requisition : requests
Requisition "1" *-- "*" Test : includes

Patient "1" --> "*" Appointment
Lab "1" --> "*" Appointment
Requisition "1" --> "*" Appointment

note right of Doctor
Doctor and Person are separate because 
a doctor can prescribe tests to another 
doctor, requiring a distinction.
end note

@enduml
generated_plantuml.CoT:
@startuml

enum AppointmentType {
    Scheduled
    WalkIn
    DropOffSample
}

class Doctor {
    practitionerNumber : String
    fullName : String
    address : String
    phoneNumber : String
    signature : Image
    requisitionDate : Date
}

class Patient {
    healthNumber : String
    firstName : String
    lastName : String
    dateOfBirth : Date
    address : String
    phoneNumber : String
}

class Requisition {
    doctor : Doctor
    patient : Patient
    testGroup : TestGroup
    repeatCount : Integer
    interval : Interval
}

class TestGroup {
    groupName : String
}

class Test {
    testName : String
    testGroup : TestGroup
    duration : Integer
    appointmentType : AppointmentType
}

class TestResult {
    test : Test
    result : String
    report : String
}

class TimeInterval {
    interval : Interval
}

class Appointment {
    patient : Patient
    lab : Lab
    requisition : Requisition
    appointmentDate : Date
    startTime : Time
    endTime : Time
    confirmationNumber : String
}

class Lab {
    name : String
    registrationNumber : String
    address : String
    businessHours : TimeInterval
    changeCancelFee : Double
}

/' Associations '/

Doctor "1" --> "*" Requisition : prescribe
Patient "1" --> "*" Requisition : receive
Requisition "1" --> "*" Test : contain
Test "1" --> "1" TestGroup : belong
Test "1" --> "1" TestResult : has
TimeInterval "1" <-- "1..*" Lab : has
Lab "1" --> "*" Test : offer
Appointment "1" --> "1" Lab : at
Appointment "1" --> "1" Requisition : for
Test "1" --> "1" AppointmentType : has

note right of AppointmentType
AppointmentType is an enumeration
that defines types of appointments
for tests: Scheduled, WalkIn, DropOffSample
end note

@enduml

    done
    notApplicable
}

}

class Organizer {
    firstName : String
    lastName : String

}

    firstName : String
    lastName : String
    email : String
    password : String

}

    startDate : DateTime
    endDate : DateTime
    occasion : String

}

    address : String
}

class Task {

}

CelO "1" *-- "*" Organizer

CelO "1" *-- "*" Task

Event "1" --> "1..*" Organizer : organizes
Event "*" --> "*" Attendee : attends

Task "0..1" --> "1" Attendee : assignedTo

}

@startuml

' ======================
' Enumerations
' ======================

enum TravelPreferences {
    breakfastIncluded
    freeWifi
    frontDesk247
}

enum RoomType {
    single
    double
    twin
}

enum BookingType {
    preliminary
    regular
}

enum PaymentType {
    prePaid
    payAtHotel
}

' ======================
' Classes
' ======================

class Traveller {
    name : String
    billingInfo : BillingInformation
    travelPreferences : Set<TravelPreferences>
    reliabilityRating : Float
}

class BillingInformation {
    companyName : String
    companyAddress : String
}

class SearchCriteria {
    city : String
    arrivalDate : Date
    departureDate : Date
    numberOfRooms : Int
    roomType : RoomType
    minRating : Int
    maxCostPerNight : Float
    travelPreferences : Set<TravelPreferences>
}

class Hotel {
    name : String
    city : String
    address : String
    rating : Int
    chain : String
    availableRooms : Map<RoomType, Int>
}

class Booking {
    bookingId : String
    bookingType : BookingType
    hotel : Hotel
    traveller : Traveller
    roomType : RoomType
    startDate : Date
    endDate : Date
    paymentType : PaymentType
    cancellationDeadline : Date
    bookingStatus : String
    specialOffers : List<SpecialOffer>
}

class SpecialOffer {
    booking : Booking
    offerId : String
    offeredBy : Hotel
    offerPrice : Float
    offerDeadline : Date
}

' ======================
' Relationships
' ======================

Traveller "1" --> "1..*" Booking : register
Traveller "1" --> "1" SearchCriteria : search
Traveller "1" --> "0..*" SpecialOffer : receive

Hotel "1" --> "1..*" RoomType : announce
Hotel "1" --> "0..*" SpecialOffer : provide

Booking "1" --> "0..*" SpecialOffer : contain
SpecialOffer "1" --> "1" Booking : relate

Booking "1..*" --> "1..*" Hotel : associate

Booking "1" --> "1" Hotel : confirm
Booking "1" --> "1" Hotel : cancel

@enduml

}

    regular

    pre_paid
    paid_at_hotel
}

' ============================

class HBMS {
}

class Traveller {

}

    city : String
    hotelChain : String

}

}

class Booking {
    id : String

    arrivalDate : Date
    departureDate : Date
    maxCost : Float
    hotelRating : Float
    isConfirmed : Boolean

}

}

HBMS "1" *-- "*" SpecialOffer
